Following extensive taxonomic revision of Streptococcus (Collins et al., 1984b; Schleifer and Kilpper-Bälz, 1984, 1987), the genus currently consists of over 50 recognized species which, for the most part, fall within “species groups” named “Pyogenic”, “Bovis”, “Mutans”, “Mitis”, “Anginosus”, and “Salivarius”
